zh.lifeSummary: 當Austin or Augustine Kilham於1595年8月12日出生在英國素福爾可丹寧頓時，他的父親Henry Kilham37歲，母親Alice Goodale35歲。他於1619年9月8日與Alice Gorball在英國素福爾可萊塔姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1637年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆且於1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆。他去世於1667年6月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆享年71歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Austin or Augustine Kilham于1595年8月12日出生在英国素福爾可丹寧頓时，他的父亲Henry Kilham37岁，母亲Alice Goodale35岁。他于1619年9月8日与Alice Gorball在英国素福爾可萊塔姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1637年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆且于1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆。他去世于1667年6月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆享年71岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Kilham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kilham (ER Yorks), Kilham in Cantley (WR Yorks), or Kilham in Kirknewton (Northumb).

variants.name: Killham
meanings: English: from any of several places in northern England called Kilham, most of which are recorded as Killum in medieval documents, from an Old English prepositional phrase meaning ‘at the kilns’.

variants.name: Killam
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): variant of Kilham, a habitational name from any of the places in Northumberland and Yorkshire, so named either from Old English cylnum ‘(at) the kilns’, dative plural of cyln, or from Old English cyln ‘kiln’ or the personal name Cylla + Old Norse holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Austin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of the Latin name Augustinus ( see Augustine ). Both forms were used selectively in various regions of England as late as the 17th century and they are found occasionally much later, but the present-day use of this form as a given name is normally a reintroduction from its survival as a surname. It is particularly popular in the United States.

variants.name: Austyn
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of the Latin name Augustinus ( see Augustine ). Both forms were used selectively in various regions of England as late as the 17th century and they are found occasionally much later, but the present-day use of this form as a given name is normally a reintroduction from its survival as a surname. It is particularly popular in the United States.

variants.name: Austen
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of the Latin name Augustinus ( see Augustine ). Both forms were used selectively in various regions of England as late as the 17th century and they are found occasionally much later, but the present-day use of this form as a given name is normally a reintroduction from its survival as a surname. It is particularly popular in the United States.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

nameMeanings.name: Augustine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Augustinus (a derivative of Augustus ). Its most famous bearer is St Augustine of Hippo ( 354–430 ), perhaps the greatest of the Fathers of the Christian Church. He formulated the principles followed by the numerous medieval communities named after him as Austin canons, friars, and nuns. Also important in England was St Augustine of Canterbury, who brought Christianity to Kent in the 6th century. See also Austin .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Austin or Augustine Kilham was born on 12 August 1595, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, his father, Henry Kilham, was 37 and his mother, Alice Goodale, was 35. He married Alice Gorball on 8 September 1619, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1637 and Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1640. He died on 5 June 1667, in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71, and was buried in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Austin or Augustine Kilham est né le 12 août 1595, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry Kilham, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice Goodale, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Alice Gorball le 8 septembre 1619, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1637 et à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1640. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1667, à Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Austin or Augustine Kilham am 12. August 1595 in Dennington, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Kilham 37 und seine Mutter Alice Goodale 35. Er hat am 8. September 1619 in Wrentham, Suffolk, England Alice Gorball geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1637 hat er in Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1640 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 5. Juni 1667 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Austin or Augustine Kilham è nato il il 12 agosto 1595 nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Henry Kilham, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Alice Goodale, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Alice Gorball il 8 settembre 1619, nel Wrentham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1637 e nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1640. Morì il 5 giugno 1667, nel Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Austin or Augustine Kilhamが1595年8月12日にイギリススフォルクデニントンで生まれた時，父Henry Kilhamは37歳，母Alice Goodaleは35歳であった。1619年9月8日にイギリススフォルクウレンサムでAlice Gorballと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1637年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーサレムに，1640年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムに住んでいた。彼は1667年6月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスウエンハムで71歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスウエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Austin or Augustine Kilham(이)가 1595년 8월 12일 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Kilham(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Goodale(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1619년 9월 8일 영국 수폴크 렌섬에서 Alice Gorball(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1637년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘에서, 1640년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 살았다. 그는 1667년 6월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 웬함에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 웬함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Austin or Augustine Kilham nasceu em 12 de agosto de 1595, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Kilham, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice Goodale, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Gorball em 8 de setembro de 1619, em Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1637 e em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1640. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1667, em Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Austin or Augustine Kilham родился 12 августа 1595 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Kilham было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Goodale, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Gorball 8 сентября 1619 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности сеилем, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1637 году и в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1640 году. Он умер 5 июня 1667 г. в местности венам, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности венам, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Austin or Augustine Kilham nació el 12 de agosto de 1595, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Kilham, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alice Goodale, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Alice Gorball el 8 de septiembre de 1619, en Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1637 y en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1640. Murió el 5 de junio de 1667, en Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
